scripts.database:migrate: pnpm run d1 -- migrations apply DATABASE
scripts.database:create-mock: rm -f .wrangler/state/v3/d1/miniflare-D1DatabaseObject/*.sqlite* && CI=true pnpm run database:migrate -- --local && node ./packages/frontend/mock-db/run.mjs
scripts.dev: export COMMIT_HASH=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && pnpm run build && pnpm run database:migrate -- --local && pnpm run pages -- dev packages/frontend/dist --compatibility-date=2022-12-20
scripts.ci-dev-test-ui: pnpm run build && pnpm run database:create-mock && pnpm run pages -- dev packages/frontend/dist --binding 'DOMAIN=0.0.0.0' --binding 'INSTANCE_TITLE=Test Wildebeest' --binding 'INSTANCE_DESCR=My Wildebeest Instance' --binding 'ACCESS_AUTH_DOMAIN=0.0.0.0.cloudflareaccess.com' --binding 'ACCESS_AUD=DEV_AUD' --binding 'ADMIN_EMAIL=george@test.email' --binding 'userKEK=test-kek' --compatibility-date=2022-12-20
scripts.deploy:init: pnpm run pages -- project create wildebeest && pnpm run d1 -- create wildebeest
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && pnpm run database:migrate && pnpm run pages -- deploy packages/frontend/dist --project-name=wildebeest
